remarks: Nestled on nearly an acre, this charming 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home offers a peaceful country feel paired with a long list of desirable amenities. The kitchen is sure to impress any home chef with its beautiful wood cabinetry, granite tile  countertops, newer electric cooktop and microwave, and a quaint breakfast bar ideal for quick bites. When it’s time to unwind, the primary suite offers the tranquility you need featuring generous space, a nicely sized closet, and a primary bathroom. Additional highlights include ceiling fans throughout, a pellet stove for added warmth, two comfortable guest bedrooms, and an attached 1-car garage. Enjoy year-round outdoor living from the covered back deck overlooking the expansive backyard, perfect for viewing the changing seasons. With its spacious lot and thoughtfully designed features, this home has everything you need to live comfortably. Don’t miss the chance to make it yours!

remarks:
Escape to your own private sanctuary on seven stunning acres where Mill Creek flows through your backyard and nature puts on a daily show. This magnificent Southwestern­ style ranch house offers over 2,400 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space featuring soaring open beam ceilings and authentic Saltillo tile flooring imported from Mexico - some tiles even showcase amusing bobcat and coyote footprints from their Mexican adventures. 
The heart of this home is the great room with its centrally located wood stove and expansive windows that blur the lines between indoor and outdoor living. The spacious kitchen delights with abundant storage, colorful tile countertops, custom lighting, and a generous walk-in pantry. A large laundry room with folding counter makes household tasks seem effortless. 
Two comfortable bedrooms include a guest room with French door patio access and an impressive primary bedroom that feels like a personal retreat. The primary suite boasts dramatic open beams, oversized windows, dual vanity sinks, walk-in closet with built-in storage, a garden tub, and walk-in shower.
The converted garage creates versatile bonus space perfect for a third bedroom or hosting an event; complete with a half bath and separate entrance. Multiple patios accommodate intimate gatherings or larger celebrations.
Outdoor enthusiasts will treasure the three-stall horse barn with tack room, power, water, and thoughtful fencing. Trail ride through your wildlife sanctuary spotting deer, coyotes, bobcats, quail, foxes, and eagles. Each fall, witness the spectacular return of King salmon spawning in your creek. 
Owned solar, detached two-car garage with carport, circular drive ensuring privacy, and low-maintenance landscaping complete this extraordinary property where every day feels like vacation.

remarks: studios, and light industry, on a two-block long street with no through traffic, the architect has created a compelling environment for living and working in community. Legally zoned for both commercial and residential purposes, four separate structures on the property allow for a variety of live/work configurations. On one hand, the combination provides an outstanding single-family alternative, with four bedrooms, four bathrooms, and three additional studio spaces, each with its own powder room. On the other hand, the property represents a unique investor opportunity as fully-rentable income property. Each unit has its own individual utility metering, with the possibility of as many as seven different tenants, and all units will be delivered vacant at closing. Finally, as a commercial property, the individual spaces could be used for storefront, office, creative, fabrication, or retail purposes. The permutations and possibilities are virtually endless. The architecture itself is quite exciting, with a vintage 1920s bungalow in back and three new stand-alone structures in front, each with a one-bedroom apartment upstairs and a studio space downstairs, and lushly-landscaped outdoor gardens and courtyards in between. The cantilevered orthogonal volumes, exposed structural steel, corrugated metal cladding, and ribbon window system are evocative of the Case Study House program, enhanced for contemporary living. Inside, a restrained palette of materials enlivens interactions, with sliding polycarbonate panels, polished concrete and colorful Marmoleum floors, and operable windows for cross breezes and views of nearby hills and snowcapped mountains beyond. The original bungalow has been completely renovated from top to bottom, with metal board-and-batten siding in dialogue with the front buildings, cork floors, all new finishes, covered decks, and French doors opening onto a private outdoor patio. Original 1924 Bungalow in back has been fully renovated (1 BD, 1 BA, 678 SF); Three new structures built in 2022 each have an apartment upstairs (1 BD, 1 BA, 638 SF) plus a studio/workshop/second bedroom downstairs (1 BD,  1/2 BA, 377 SF), for a total of 1,015 SF each. 4 Separately-Metered Addresses, 7 Units | 4 Bedrooms, 3 Studios | 7 Bathrooms | 3,723 Square Feet | 7,840 SF Lot.

Perfectly positioned just moments from the beach, downtown, Pacific City, shopping, dining, and more, this home offers an exceptional blend of relaxation and everyday convenience. remarks: Located in the gated 55+ community of Villa Trieste in Oceanside, this ground-level condo offers easy, single-level living with gorgeous French patio doors in both the kitchen nook and living room, opening to private patios and allowing you to fully enjoy the beautiful San Diego lifestyle. The unit includes one detached garage plus one uncovered parking space. This home is truly move-in ready and thoughtfully updated for comfort, safety, and peace of mind with over 90k in recent updates. The seller focused on major systems first, making this an ideal low-maintenance home for the next owner. Major upgrades include a full plumbing repipe for hot and cold water with transferable warranty, a new premium SEI HVAC system with transferable warranty, a new Rheem water heater, and the HOA roof special assessment paid in full. Inside, the home has been refreshed from top to bottom. The entire interior has been newly painted and updated with new luxury vinyl plank flooring in the living room and hallway, along with baseboards for a clean, modern look. Ceramic tile upgrades were added to the exterior entry, both patios, bathrooms, and laundry room. The primary bathroom has been remodeled with new tile and finishes, while the second bathroom received updated vanity work and re-grouting. Additional improvements include new lighting, new door and cabinet hardware, custom high-end plantation shutters, new window coverings, and a TV mount with electrical connection. The kitchen has been upgraded with new countertops, sink, faucet, disposal, and a remodeled ceiling with recessed lighting. Appliances include a Bosch dishwasher, Frigidaire stove and oven, Whirlpool microwave with built-in exhaust, and a Samsung 36-inch French-door refrigerator with beverage center, many with extended warranties. Practical upgrades continue throughout the home with new gas line connections for the stove and dryer, a quick-disconnect exterior BBQ gas line, new washer and dryer, new patio hose bibs, an invisible screen front door, and living room window repairs. Villa Trieste is a well-maintained, gated 55+ community known for its great amenities, friendly neighborhood feel, and convenient Oceanside location close to shopping, dining, and coastal access. This is a great opportunity to own a ground-level condo where the major upgrades have already been completed and outdoor living can be enjoyed year-round.

Highly desirable Arbor Plan 2 located in the amenity-rich Portola Springs Village. This 2-story detached home offers 2,347 square feet of living space with an open-concept layout. The main level features a stylish kitchen with white Thermofoil cabinetry, quartz countertops, Jenn Air stainless steel appliances, and a large island with seating. The great room flows into the dining area, with a powder bath and attached 2-car garage completing the first floor.

Upstairs includes a spacious primary suite with a freestanding bathtub, separate shower, double sinks, and walk-in closet. Prime Irvine location close to shopping, dining, freeways, recreation, and top-rated schools.

remarks: Charming custom horse ranch featuring a 2,000 sq. ft. metal workshop with full power—plus exceptional outbuildings and move-in ready living. The home has been thoughtfully rehabbed over the years with a new roof, updated HVAC, new windows, new flooring, recessed LED lighting with dimmers and fresh paint. Interior highlights include updated baths (the hall bath features a soaker tub), a master suite with barn-style door and large walk-in closet leading to the master bath, and a refreshed kitchen with quartz counters, refinished cabinets, recessed lighting, pull-out pantry shelves and a\r\r\n new stove. A pellet stove in the living room provides additional warmth, and a spacious enclosed sunroom—currently used for a pool table—also includes a pellet stove. The 2,000 sq. ft. metal workshop has full power and two roll-up doors, ideal for equipment, vehicles or a workspace. Additional ranch amenities include a barn with capacity for approximately 100 bales of hay, a playhouse, a relaxing spa that stays, and a concrete slab ready for a splash pool. Property landscaping and utilities include two almond trees, black walnuts, and plum, a 14-zone irrigation system, a dog run, replaced and stained fencing with new gates, and a septic tank with a riser installed. The garage area offers a hobby/storage room, 240V electrical, water softener, two tankless water heaters and a reverse osmosis system under a sink. This property qualifies for USDA financing. Please verify with your lender.

remarks: Prime Multi-Unit Investment Opportunity in San Ysidro! Unlock immediate cash flow and long-term wealth building with this rare 5-bed, 3-bath income-producing compound on a spacious lot in the heart of booming San Ysidro—minutes from the border, freeways, and explosive commercial/residential growth. At $699K, you’re buying below replacement cost with built-in equity and multiple value-add paths.  Why This Property Crushes It: Instant positive cash flow from Day 1 Vacant side unit = immediate upside (rent at $800–$1,000+/mo) Zoning + lot size = ADU / new construction potential Live in one unit, rent the rest (house hack & eliminate your mortgage) San Ysidro’s growth trajectory: border proximity, new housing demand, and commercial expansion = rising rents & property values  Key Development Standards for RM-1-1 Based on SDMC §131.0440 et seq. and 2025 updates:  Standard Details Notes for this Lot (8257 sqft) Density Max 1 dwelling unit per 1,000 sq ft of lot area  Floor Area Ratio (FAR) 0.75 (75% of lot area can be building footprint/floors) HeightMax 30 ft (2–3 stories) Setbacks Front: 15–20 ft (avg. of block); Side: 5 ft; Rear: 15 ft (or 20% of depth). Parking 1 space per unit (0.5 for studios/1-beds); none required for ADUs near transit (e.g., trolley in San Ysidro). Single-story Cul-de-sac  No rear neighbors

remarks:
In the heart of Elysian Valley, where modern design meets the creative energy of Frogtown, this rare offering features two fully reimagined residences sold together, yet designed to live entirely independently. Separated by fencing, each home enjoys its own gated driveway, private yard, two-car garage (one of them attached), separate meters, and individual central air systems, offering flexibility with privacy.

2229 Shoredale spans approximately 928 square feet and is infused with a calm, refined aesthetic that includes updated wood flooring, recessed lighting, and black-framed dual-pane windows set a sleek tone throughout. The living room captures morning light through a picture window overlooking drought-tolerant landscaping, with a charming front porch ideal for a bistro table or bench. An elegant dining room with built-in cabinetry with lighting, tray like ceiling, stylish light fixture flows into a beautifully updated kitchen featuring gold-veined quartz countertops, modern cabinetry, and included appliances: refrigerator, gas range, drawer microwave, and dishwasher. 

A sunlit stackable laundry (also included) area sits just off the kitchen. Two spacious bedrooms include a private rear primary suite. The guest bath offers a separate tub and shower, while the ¾ en suite delivers spa-inspired design. 

Outdoors, a long gated driveway leads to the garage with additional space for entertaining, gardening, or play in the lush green grass where you can ground yourself.

2225 Shoredale mirrors the same thoughtful craftsmanship with a distinct layout and its own private lot, drought-tolerant landscaping, and attached two-car garage. 

The entry opens to airy, open-concept living that flows into the dining area and kitchen, complete with the same appliance package. 

A powder room left of the entry near the door to the garage and across from the stairs adds convenience. 

Upstairs are three well-proportioned bedrooms, including a generous primary suite with mirrored closets and an en suite bath featuring built-in shower shelving. The landing offers custom cabinetry for storage or display, with two additional bedrooms and an updated bath completing the level.

Together, these homes offer sleek design, intentional function, and exceptional versatility: ideal for multigenerational living, investment, or a live-one-rent-one opportunity in one of LA’s most dynamic neighborhoods.

A long driveway leads to a detached 4-car garage, providing ample space for your vehicles and recreational toys, while the expansive front patio invites you to unwind and enjoy the outdoors.

Step inside to discover a rustic yet inviting home, where vaulted ceilings adorned with wooden paneling and exposed beams create a sense of grandeur. The blend of carpet and laminate flooring throughout complements the timeless beauty of a brick fireplace, exuding old-world charm.

The spacious kitchen is a true focal point, featuring built-in appliances, rich wood cabinetry, and tile countertops accented with a tasteful backsplash. With its prime location this property presents a rare opportunity to create your own personal oasis while enjoying the convenience of local amenities. The land is accessible from both the front and rear of the lot, offering flexibility and potential for expansion.

remarks: EXCELLENT LOCATION! Perched up high for wonderful breezes, privacy and views of saddleback mountain and a large greenbelt. This completely remodeled \"VILLA FUENTE\" model is a two-bedroom, two-bath single-level home with an attached oversized car garage large enough for a car and golf cart and a short walk to Clubhouse 5. The backyard of the property faces east for morning sun and lots of privacy from your large newly tiled patio with patio cover. This end unit really feels like a detached home, sits up high with fantastic views of the hills and mountains from your living room, master bedroom and patio. Floor plan has been opened up with ceilings raised and 2 brand new skylights with built-in-shades, custom stone backdrop with LED lighting & electric fireplace more welcoming open layout. Upon entering, you will notice the large kitchen island to your left and the beautifully re-configured and remodeled kitchen sitting directly under a skylight. Entire home features luxury vinyl plank flooring, recessed lights, quartz countertops, central air, and much more. Large master bedroom suite has its own sliding door to rear patio with views of the large backyard and mountains. Laundry has been conveniently re-located to a newly built closet in hallway between both bedrooms. The garage is very spacious and can easily accommodate a large vehicle and golf cart with room to spare. Both bathrooms have been completely remodeled with modern touches and finishes. Walk-in showers with frameless glass doors offer safety for getting in and out and convenience. driveway can hold 2 cars, plus there is ample open parking space in front and to the side of the home. Come enjoy the incredible amenities Laguna Woods has to offer those seeking an Active living style or retirement with the security of a Gated Community. Laguna Woods Village is a Golfers Haven featuring 27-holes of championship golf. Residents can use golf carts within the Community as well. Other amenities include: 24-hour gated community with attendant, bus transportation, Equestrian center, 10-tennis court complex, pickle ball courts, Laguna Woods Village is close to beaches, shopping, restaurants, freeways, toll-roads, and medical facilities. Your monthly HOA includes water, trash, basic cable, landscaping, insurance and exterior building maintenance. Located only 6-7 miles from world class Laguna Beach and a couple miles from the fabulous Irvine Spectrum, this home and community are truly a special place to live!!

remarks:
Immaculate rare 3 units property, located South-of-the-Boulevard investment gem in the heart of Woodland Hills! This beautifully maintained three-unit property offers exceptional versatility, modern upgrades, and strong income potential—all just moments from Ventura Blvd., The Village, and the vibrant Warner Center district. Situated on a spacious corner lot with excellent curb appeal, the property features a remodeled main residence, a fully equipped upper-level unit, and a private ground-floor ADU, each with its own entrance and outdoor area. Every unit is tastefully updated with quality finishes, thoughtful design, and conveniences today’s tenants love. Unit A (approx. 1,638 sq ft) is the main residence located on the first floor, offering 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms, an open-concept layout, generous natural light, and both front and rear yard space—perfect for outdoor relaxation or entertaining. Unit B (approx. 1,075 sq ft) sits above the garage and includes 3 bedrooms and 1.5 bathrooms, creating an ideal space for extended family, guests, or reliable rental income. Unit C is a spacious ground-floor 1 bedroom / 1 bath ADU (approx. 792 sq ft) with its own private yard and garden area. Designed for privacy and independence, this ADU provides excellent supplemental income. It also features its own electric meter, offering flexibility and reduced overhead for the owner. 
All three units have been stylishly upgraded with contemporary materials, individual washer/dryer setups, tankless water heaters, and well-appointed kitchens and baths. The property also boasts a brand-new roof, modern concrete-and-turf driveway, ample off-street parking, and a three-car garage.
Located within walking distance to Warner Center Park, The Village, Topanga Mall, Starbucks, and endless dining and entertainment options, this property places residents at the center of one of the most desirable pockets of Woodland Hills. With the ongoing Warner Center redevelopment—including future mixed-use development and the planned Los Angeles Rams facility—this area continues to experience significant growth and appreciation.
Whether you’re an investor seeking strong cash flow, a homeowner looking for additional income, or a multi-generational family needing flexible living arrangements, this property presents an extraordinary opportunity in a prime location. A must-see for buyers seeking a turnkey, high-performing, multi-unit asset south of Ventura Blvd.

remarks: An unparalleled opportunity to acquire a perfectly positioned, front-row residence within the coveted enclave of Emerald Bay. This exceptional location on the Emerald Green park mere yards from the edge of the Pacific Ocean allows the sound of the waves and the movement of sea air to permeate every part of the property. Wake to cheerful morning sunshine with a tennis court, a manicured community grass field, beach volleyball or a dip in the ocean just steps from your front door. This tranquil, light-filled home, a haven for its current owners for decades, now offers a blank canvas for those seeking to realize their dream of coastal living. The main living area capitalizes on the beach and ocean views, with oversized windows framing the breathtaking vistas beyond. Brimming with midcentury modern charm, the living room features a full-height brick mantle fireplace, vaulted ceilings, and built-in details. Multiple access points to the backyard invite the outside in, with lush, mature landscaping creating a sense of privacy. A kitchen with a breakfast nook, two ample bedrooms, a den, and two bathrooms complete the single-level floor plan. Much more than just a neighborhood, the community of Emerald Bay is revered for its exclusive amenities: a residents-only beach, green spaces, sports courts, a lap pool, and a year-round events calendar —all within the easily accessible North Laguna Beach location.

remarks: Mulholland Canyon Ranch Perched high above the Malibu coast and canyons, Mulholland Canyon Ranch is a rare and stunning equestrian retreat offering awe-inspiring mountain and ocean views across approximately 3.26 serene acres. This beautifully crafted estate includes 4 bedrooms and 4.5 baths. A thoughtfully designed 3 bedroom, 3.5 bath main residence and a dreamy 1 bedroom, 1 bath guest house, blending modern luxury with rustic charm. Step inside to find soaring ceilings, concrete floors, concrete counters, striking steel framed doors and windows that bathe the home in natural light.  Enjoy breathtaking views and fresh breezes through expansive glass openings that blur the line between indoors and out. The luxurious primary suite features dual showers, a spa-like soaking tub, and a private balcony that sits high above the lush, manicured grounds - framing a gorgeous view of the ocean. Each bedroom offers a private en-suite bath and access to a shared balcony. The family room features built in closets, a dedicated desk area and its own private balcony with gorgeous views. Outdoors, indulge in a resort-style setting with covered seating, a sleek wet bar, outdoor shower and a tranquil reflection pond accented by a cascading waterfall. The lush, mature landscaping showcases stately olive trees and a vibrant tapestry of foliage, creating a serene and private retreat. Designed for the ultimate Malibu lifestyle, the property features versatile equestrian facilities including a lighted eight-stall barn with a tack room, multiple turnouts, two large corrals and a riding arena. A large covered and fenced structure offers flexible use as a stylish chicken coop, dog kennel, or creative outdoor space. With its celebrity pedigree and a park-like setting that is peaceful and private, this fully fenced and double gated property is the ultimate blend of nature, luxury and lifestyle, offering a rare opportunity to own a true Malibu retreat.

remarks: Welcome to Bridgeport Terrace, a sought-after gated community in the heart of Laguna Niguel. This two-story townhome features two bedrooms and a thoughtfully designed full bath with separated vanity areas, two private restrooms and a guest bathroom downstairs. This home offers rare privacy with no neighbors above or below.  Step inside to a bright, open floor plan filled with natural light. The inviting living area provides flexible space for both a comfortable lounge setup and a dining area—perfect for everyday living or entertaining guests. Just beyond, the kitchen blends style and function with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, pull-out storage, pantry, recessed lighting, and a convenient breakfast bar. From here, step out to your private, fenced patio—an ideal spot to unwind, sip your morning coffee, take in the morning sun, host friends, or create a cozy outdoor retreat for kids or pets.  Upstairs, you’ll find a secondary bedroom with a walk-in closet and vanity area, including a spacious primary suite with mirrored closet doors, a ceiling fan, and a dual-sink vanity in the ensuite bath. Thoughtful upgrades include indoor laundry with washer and dryer included, double-pane windows, central heating and air, and solar panels—making this the ONLY SOLAR EQUIPPED unit in the entire community for added energy savings.  Parking is a breeze with a detached one-car garage complete with built-in storage and an automatic opener, along with an additional assigned parking space for guests. Bridgeport Terrace offers a resort-style lifestyle with gated access, a sparkling pool and spa, picnic areas BBQ, and beautifully landscaped grounds. HOA dues cover basic AT&T cable, trash service, exterior maintenance, landscaping, and structure insurance. FHA and VA approved. Ideally located near Dana Point beaches, Saddleback College, Mission Viejo Mall, award-winning schools, and with easy access to the 73 Toll Road and I-5 freeway, this home perfectly blends comfort, efficiency, and the Southern California lifestyle.  This is one you truly have to see to appreciate!

remarks:
Welcome to 602 S Deming St — a newly renovated home in the heart of Santa Ana’s vibrant Vietnamese community, just moments from Little Saigon. Inside, the home features brand-new luxury vinyl flooring, fresh interior paint, an upgraded kitchen with new cabinets, countertops, and fixtures, and a remodeled bathroom with modern finishes. The layout is practical, comfortable, and completely move-in ready.

The location is a huge plus for anyone who wants to be close to Vietnamese businesses, food, and community. Saint Barbara Catholic Church on Euclid Street is only a short walk away, serving as a major gathering point for the local Vietnamese Catholic community. Little Saigon — centered around Bolsa Avenue in Westminster and Garden Grove — is just a quick drive away and is known as the largest Vietnamese community outside of Vietnam, packed with shops, cafés, markets, and specialty restaurants.

Food-wise, you’re in prime territory. Popular Kei Concepts spots such as Vox Kitchen and NEP Cafe in Fountain Valley, Kei Coffee House in Westminster, and many other Kei eateries are all close by. In addition, countless mom-and-pop Vietnamese restaurants, bakeries, boba shops, and cafés throughout Little Saigon offer endless dining options.

For outdoor recreation, Mile Square Park in Fountain Valley is just up Euclid Street, offering lakes, golf courses, sports fields, walking trails, and large open green spaces. Shopping and work access are excellent as well: South Coast Plaza and the surrounding Costa Mesa dining and retail scene are all close by. The Irvine Business Complex, major Irvine office corridors, and key employment centers are also within easy reach. John Wayne Airport (SNA) is conveniently located nearby for quick travel access, and Disneyland is well within reach for weekend outings.

remarks: Welcome to Pauma Valley Country Club! This exclusive and private, guard-gated community is surrounded by scenic mountain views, lush landscaping, and world-class golf!! Perfectly blending rural tranquility with resort-style amenities, this energy efficient and turnkey 3-bedroom, 3-bath, 2,124 sq. ft. home offers the ideal retreat. Each spacious bedroom includes an en-suite bathroom and ample storage. The primary suite boasts expansive sliding closets and a built-in dresser for effortless organization. Downtown San Diego is just over an hour away, and Palm Springs or Los Angeles are easy weekend getaways. Experience the perfect balance of comfort, sophistication, and security in one of California’s most exclusive hidden gems. Schedule your private showing today before it is too late!!!

remarks:
Welcome to this unique property this beautifully maintained and thoughtfully updated property offers a perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and charm. Originally remodeled in 2007, the home features a stunning feature kitchen updated in 2021 with rich hickory cabinets, an electric stove with an air fryer, a matching over-the-range microwave, and a refrigerator that stays with the home.

The water-resistant, LVP flooring, added in 2021, complements the freshly painted living room, primary bedroom, bathroom, and hall. The far side of the home includes oak floating floors and French doors leading to the outdoors. A convenient nook in the hallway could easily be enclosed to create a spacious closet, while the current 10x10 walk-in closet—located between the bathroom and bedroom—offers flexibility for use as an office or nursery.

The main bathroom features an oversized soaking tub and a large walk-in shower. Additional upgrades include an outdoor tankless water heater (with propane tanks that typically require refilling only once a year) for the master bath, a newer water softener, electric water heater for the rest of the home, and reverse osmosis water filter system. With 24 solar panels and a private well, there are no electric, gas, or water bills. The home also includes a wood-burning stove in addition to central heating and air conditioning, which was serviced in May. (The well is shared with one part-time neighbor. There is also a 5,000-gallon water storage tank on the property.)

Outside, you’ll find a spacious patio with a gazebo, a step-in jacuzzi, a ceiling fan, and outdoor lighting—perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The property slopes gently down toward a small creek that widens across the road. There is ample room for RV or boat parking.

The three-car garage includes a new workbench, washer and dryer, a wood-burning stove, and a built-in air compressor. Three additional sheds provide excellent storage and flexibility: one is approximately three-quarters full of chopped firewood, another is dedicated to outdoor tools, and the third—a Tuff Shed—can serve as a bunkhouse, office, or guest space. The Tuff Shed is internet-ready with Starlink service.

Located in a peaceful canyon with no through traffic, this property offers privacy, self-sufficiency, and natural beauty—all just a short drive from town conveniences.

remarks:
Shimmering water vistas, contemporary architecture, and bespoke interiors define this extraordinary waterfront residence. Approximately 53 feet of water frontage and a private 40-foot dock anchor a bayfront deck designed for effortless entertaining, complete with an in-ground spa and expansive outdoor living space.

Design-forward living is evident upon arrival, introduced by newly installed custom tinted garage doors with walnut frames and a custom walnut-and-glass pivot front door with matching gate. Spanning approximately 4,440 square feet, the thoughtfully designed floor plan offers four en suite bedrooms and four-and-one-half baths, including a main-level suite ideal for guests or multigenerational living.

A dramatic foyer sets the tone with double-height ceilings, a floating staircase accented by custom stainless steel railings, and floor-to-ceiling windows sandblasted for privacy. Wide-plank wood floors and a sculptural Tom Dixon light fixture elevate the sense of arrival. Main living spaces center around a book-matched granite fireplace, where expansive sliding glass doors frame views of the boat-dotted harbor beyond.

Indoor-outdoor flow continues into a waterfront dining room anchored by a statement Bocci chandelier crafted from hand-blown glass. Culinary pursuits are elevated in a custom gourmet kitchen featuring waterfall-edge onyx countertops, bespoke cabinetry, a wet bar, Wolf range, built-in Sub-Zero refrigeration, high-top seating, and a Sub-Zero wine cooler.

Two staircases lead to the upper level, where three en suite bedrooms are complemented by a fireplace-warmed bonus or game room with wet bar and a secondary laundry room. Retreat-like privacy defines the primary suite, showcasing Promontory Bay views from a private balcony, mirrored wardrobe walls, a freestanding soaking tub, separate shower, and refined Foscarini lighting.

Additional highlights include skylights, curated Restoration Hardware lighting, specialty tile from Artistic Tile and TileBar, floating built-in cabinetry, a Murphy bed in one bedroom, solar-assisted air conditioning, an alarm system with video surveillance, and an attached three-car garage. Ideally positioned moments from Lido Marina Village, Fashion Island, world-class resorts, and award-winning schools, this waterfront estate offers a rare connection to Newport Beach’s most coveted coastal lifestyle.

Located on the highly coveted Oceanside of Emerald Bay, this three-bedroom, three-bath home offers the perfect blend of historic charm and contemporary livability. New double paned windows flood the interiors with natural light, accentuating the rich architectural details throughout.

The floor plan offers exceptional versatility, ideal as a full-time residence or a beachside retreat. Highlights include an inviting enclosed side yard perfect for entertaining or play, a separate family room or office for added flexibility, and a rare basement providing abundant storage.

Within close proximity to Emerald Bay’s pristine beach, this enchanting home invites you to experience the romance, warmth, and lifestyle that make Emerald Bay one of California’s most treasured coastal communities.

Relaxed mountain living just 5 minutes to Hwy 17, 15 minutes to downtown Los Gatos, & easy Silicon Valley access.

remarks: This elegant and functional wine country estate comprises approximately 93± acres in Paso Robles’ prized Estrella Sub-Appellation. It includes an excellent quality producing vineyard of approximately 71.5± acres planted to Cabernet Sauvignon, Petite Sirah, and Sauvignon Blanc. The main residence spans roughly 3,004± sq. ft. and provides sophisticated amenities for both daily living and entertaining, including seamless indoor-outdoor flow with a lap pool, outdoor kitchen, climate-controlled wine cellar, and sweeping vineyard views. Inside, the 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath layout showcases vaulted ceilings, exposed beam architecture, and high-end finishes throughout. The gourmet kitchen features stainless steel appliances, a central island with prep sink and bar seating, plus a breakfast nook overlooking the vines. The primary suite offers a spa-inspired bathroom with dual vanities, soaking tub, walk-in shower, and direct access to a private patio. A detached 576± sq. ft. casita with a full kitchen and bathroom provides additional flexibility—ideal for guest accommodations, an office retreat, or hobby studio. Outdoor living is equally inviting with a covered patio, built-in BBQ, pizza oven, refrigerator, bocce court, and a beautifully landscaped garden with upgraded irrigation. Equestrian enthusiasts will appreciate the custom five-stall Barnmaster barn (completed in 2022) featuring a tack room, wash rack, covered porch, water tank, and tankless water heater. The property also includes a 2,273± sq. ft. guest house with three bedrooms, two bathrooms, multiple living spaces, and a fenced yard—accessible via a private driveway. Additional highlights include an arena, equipment storage, a detached two-car garage, and paved driveways. Just minutes from downtown Paso Robles, this exceptional estate blends refined living, productive vineyards, and tranquil countryside surroundings into one remarkable offering.

3 homes — 21018, 21016 & 21020 Lull St — on 1 beautifully remodeled property offering modern comfort, flexibility, and exceptional income potential. Currently the property provides short term income from the residences and nursery which are non-conforming legal uses that are grandfathered.\r\r\nThis property is ideally suited for the construction of a grand estate residence with an ADU, thoughtfully designed to capture the scale and lifestyle this setting affords. The acreage allows room for a private equestrian riding arena, barn, and stalls, as well as resort-style amenities including a pool and pool house, an extended six-car garage, basketball and tennis courts, and beautifully curated outdoor spaces. Agricultural potential abounds with room for a vineyard, citrus grove, or landscaped gardens, blending luxury living with the area’s rich ranch and farming heritage.\r\r\nSet within a vibrant and historic community, the property is just moments from the iconic Mission San Juan Capistrano district, where charming and walkable streets lead to boutique shops, lively bars, and acclaimed farm-to-table restaurants. This is a rare chance to craft a private equestrian estate while remaining closely connected to the cultural, culinary, and social heart of San Juan Capistrano. Submit!!

remarks:
Ready to build!Nestled in the heart of San Marino’s most prestigious and established estate enclave, Oak Knoll Avenue presents a rare and extraordinary opportunity to secure one of the finest legacy residential parcels in the area. Located just moments from the iconic Langham Hotel and a short stroll to the beloved Lacy Park, this nearly 31,000-square-foot flat lot offers unmatched privacy, scale, and development potential in one of Southern California’s most highly regarded neighborhoods.

The property is offered primarily for land value, providing an exceptional canvas for the creation of a world-class custom residence. The existing home is planned to be removed, and the sale includes fully developed and submitted architectural plans for an elegant 5,935-square-foot two-story Spanish-inspired luxury estate with a three-car garage. This design concept embraces timeless architectural character, refined indoor-outdoor living, and modern lifestyle functionality—perfectly aligned with the area’s historic charm and luxury standards. With a wide frontage, generous setbacks, mature trees, and expansive grounds, the site affords both privacy and presence, offering the flexibility to create a resort-like environment with pool, gardens, and multiple outdoor entertainment zones. The parcel’s impressive lot size also presents potential for additional improvements, including an ADU or guest casita, subject to city approval—further enhancing the long-term value and versatility of the site. 

Located within the boundaries of the award-winning San Marino School District and surrounded by many of the city’s most iconic estates, this address is synonymous with enduring prestige, architectural excellence, and generational value. Opportunities to acquire large, build-ready estate parcels in this prime heritage zone are exceedingly limited, particularly those accompanied by pre-planned luxury home designs that honor the neighborhood’s character while meeting modern standards of scale, livability, and privacy. A rare blend of location, scale, architectural vision, and development readiness, this estate-caliber parcel invites its next steward to bring a dream home to life in one of the most distinguished pockets of San Marino.

remarks: Wind Dance Estate is a rare multigenerational offering set on approximately 40 acres in the heart of Avila Valley, one of the Central Coast’s most desirable coastal locations. Properties of this scale, privacy, and versatility are seldom available so close to Avila Beach and downtown San Luis Obispo. Thoughtfully developed over decades, the estate blends architectural depth, water resources, agricultural productivity, and lifestyle flexibility, all framed by sweeping panoramic valley views. The main residence offers approximately 5,500 sq ft of architecturally rich living space with a thoughtful separation of public entertaining areas and private living quarters. Features include a stone wood-burning fireplace, a light-filled glass conservatory for year-round indoor–outdoor living, an open kitchen with distinctive ceiling detail, a richly paneled library, studio, handcrafted cabinetry and counters, cherry wood finishes sourced from a single lot, tall, angled ceilings, a sculptural staircase, and multiple connections to outdoor living areas. Designed for true multigenerational living, the estate includes an attached yet fully independent secondary residence of approximately 3,100 sq ft with 3 bedrooms and 3 baths, plus a downstairs bonus room. This residence features a private entrance, high ceilings, skylights, expansive windows, bedroom lofts, and a private deck with peaceful wildlife and night-sky views. Additional living spaces include a 1-bedroom, 1-bath apartment of approximately 1,100 sq ft above the main residence’s five-car garage, and a studio-style apartment of approximately 960 sq ft above the barn, ideal for guests, caretakers, or creative use. The land is both beautiful and productive, featuring established avocado and olive orchards, gardens, and open acreage well suited for farming and livestock raising. Outdoor amenities include a resort-style pool and spa, a tranquil koi pond and waterfall, and curated art installations and sculptural elements throughout the grounds. Rolling hills, eucalyptus groves, redwoods, ocean peek views, a designated wildlife corridor, and a dark-sky environment complete the setting. Water resources include a private well, storage tanks, rainwater catchment feeding a lined pond, neighborhood water rights, and grid-tied solar, supported by a multi-use barn, farm shop, and estate-scale infrastructure.

remarks: Welcome to this stunning top-floor fully furnished condo at 1801 E Katella #4005 in Anaheim, California, where elegance meets convenience. Nestled in the highly desired Platinum Triangle neighborhood, this meticulously remodeled home has wonderful city views and boasts prime access to parking, an elevator, and storage, making it a true gem in the community. This unit comes with two parking spaces and a storage room. Step inside this delightful 784 square foot home, adorned with exquisite porcelain flooring that flows seamlessly throughout. The living space is bathed in nourishing natural light from large glass French doors that invite you to unwind on your private balcony. Enjoy evenings in your cozy living area, equipped with a large flat-screen TV, offers a perfect spot for relaxation. The modern kitchen features sleek white high-gloss cabinets with stylish brass hardware, a state-of-the-art pull-down brass faucet, and quartz countertops with elegant bar seating illuminated by beautiful LED pendant lights. With newer stainless-steel appliances and a new garbage disposal, every meal can be crafted with ease. Retreat to the spacious primary bedroom, designed for comfort with ample space for a king-sized bed. Revel in the grandeur of a lovely hanging light fixture and a generous walk-in closet that caters to all your storage needs. The updated bathroom features an updated sink with a touch-sensitive lighting mirror, Alexa speaker, a glass walk-in shower adorned with a stone mosaic floor, and Italian slate tiles. This home is complete with an efficiently designed laundry closet, accommodating new full-sized washer and dryer, and new shelving for perfect organization witth new tempered glass doors giving it a classy look. The entire home is freshly painted and impeccably cleaned, this residence is move-in ready! Experience the impressive amenities of the Stadium Lofts Community including Water, Trash, Free Wi-Fi, AMPLE GUEST PARKING, Electric Car Charging, clubhouse, a sparkling pool and spa, a fully equipped gym with a Peloton room, a sauna, indoor lounges, and outdoor BBQ areas perfect for entertaining. Enjoy the vibrant local lifestyle, with top attractions like Angel Stadium, The Grove, Disneyland, and the Honda Center all at your doorstep, along with a plethora of dining and shopping options. Convenient freeway access to the 5 and 57 freeways ensures that everything you need is close to home. Do not miss the chance to call this exquisite abode your home!

Enjoy resort-style amenities throughout the community, including Pickle Ball, paddle tennis, a sparkling pool, spa/hot tub, fitness center, and clubhouse. Social spaces such as the billiard room, card room, and banquet facilities make it easy to stay connected and active.

remarks:
Enter this meticulously maintained and updated home at the top of Park Hill via the spacious front porch, and take in the tasteful finishes and white water views! Vaulted beam ceilings and Adelaide stone fireplace complement the window wall with ocean views that stretch to the San Simeon Point and beyond. Wood floors, stone countertops and updated cabinets blend with great wall colors, creating a very relaxing home. Decks off of the living room and kitchen provide sitting areas for whale watching and BBQing. The two-car garage, with plenty of built-ins, is on the same level as the kitchen/living/dining room, along with a 1/4 bathroom. Downstairs, the main bedroom with ocean views available from bed and sitting areas, even the vanity. 
The en suite bathroom has a double vanity and a walk-in shower. Down the hall is the guest bedroom with ocean views and a full bathroom. 
The third bedroom is a separate guest quarters with its own 1/2 bath with plenty of built-ins including bunk beds.
This home is very much move-in-ready! 
The front yard is hardscaped and handsome with easy-care plants. The backyard has a vegetable garden with berries, artichokes, etc.  Below the house is a finished workshop with automatic lights, plenty of power and dry storage. Call your Realtor to see this one for yourself!

remarks: Privacy and tranquility define this single-level post-and-beam residence designed by Buff and Hensman. Once owned by the Van Halen brothers, the home beautifully captures modernist ideals with its graceful simplicity and seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. Expansive walls of glass, allowing for natural light in every room, frame stunning views of the treetops and city skyline. The thoughtfully designed floor plan places all bedrooms together in one wing, while the opposite wing features a kitchen and a separate family room with its own closet and full bathroom. A custom stained-glass window completed in 1990 by renowned artist, Judy Jansen, highlights the entry and dining areas. The home has undergone extensive upgrades, including an 800-square-foot addition, a heated pool and spa, updated landscaping, a newer air conditioning -- all while preserving the original Buff and Hensman design and enhancing it with a more contemporary interior style. First time on market in over 30 years! A rare opportunity to customize this historic home offering endless possibilities.ADDITIONAL FEATURES:Private cul-de-sac road  with only 5 houses,Views of Eaton Canyon Golf Course and mountains, Newer paved pool deck, Wood burning fireplaceExtra bonus/storage room, Viking stove/oven in kitchenIndividual laundry room, Stained glass build in 1990 upon sellers special order by renowned artist, Judy Jansen, collaborating with Buff and Hensman in many of the houses they designed, Heated pool and spa (recently re-plastered), Automatic driveway gate, 2 air and heat units-recently replaced, Newer tempered glass in large windows and sliding doors, Security shutters and plantation shutters;

remarks:
Welcome to effortless living in the sought-after 55+ gated community of Terramor. Tucked away at the end of a quiet street, this beautifully maintained home offers privacy, stunning views, and paid-off solar, making it as efficient as it is inviting.

Inside, you’ll find a fresh, clean, bright, and airy interior with an open-concept floor plan designed for both comfort and connection. High ceilings enhance the spacious feel, while the kitchen island overlooks the dining area and family room, all perfectly positioned to take in the incredible views. The kitchen shines with pendant lighting, a built-in cooktop, and crisp, modern finishes that feel like new.

The primary suite is a peaceful retreat, featuring scenic views, a spacious bathroom with dual sinks, a walk-in shower, a linen closet, and a generous walk-in closet. A secondary bedroom with its own private bathroom is ideal for guests or a home office. Additional highlights include a dedicated laundry room and a covered patio that opens to a low-maintenance yard, perfect for relaxing and enjoying the scenery without the upkeep.

Living in Terramor means enjoying a resort-style lifestyle with parks, dog parks, playgrounds, an impressive clubhouse with bar and billiard room, indoor and outdoor pools, a state-of-the-art gym, tennis and pickleball courts, and so much more.

This home offers the perfect blend of style, comfort, views, and low-maintenance living in one of the area’s premier 55+ communities.

Ask about limited-time incentives and flexible options that may help reduce closing costs or monthly payments.  From the moment you step inside, the two-story foyer makes a strong impression, opening into a beautifully connected layout that brings the Great Room, Dining area, and Kitchen together for easy entertaining and everyday living. The Kitchen features a large center island, walk-in pantry, and plenty of workspace, while the nearby Stop and Drop Area and full Bath just off Bedroom 4 provide flexibility for guests or multi-generational living. Upstairs, the Primary Suite feels like a retreat with a spacious bedroom, oversized walk-in closet, and spa-inspired bath including dual sinks, a soaking tub, and walk-in shower. Three additional bedrooms, all with walk-in closets, surround a versatile Loft — ideal for a second lounge area, media space, or home office. The upstairs Laundry Room includes optional cabinetry and a sink, while additional storage, open hallway railing, and thoughtful mechanical placement help support effortless daily life. Built by Beazer Homes — the nation’s #1 builder of DOE-certified Zero Energy Ready Homes — this home is not only stylish but also energy-smart, health-forward, and designed with long-term comfort in mind. With whole-house ventilation, Indoor Air Plus certification, and a layout that adapts to your lifestyle, this home delivers the space you want with the quality you deserve.

remarks:
Zero Repairs, Just Bring Your Furniture
Welcome to Rosena Ranch, where comfort, flexibility, and modern upgrades come together in this beautifully maintained, truly move-in-ready home. Thoughtfully designed with space for multi-generational living, this residence offers a rare downstairs bedroom—ideal for guests, extended family, or a private home office.

The remodeled kitchen anchors the home with quartz countertops, a designer backsplash, glass-front accent cabinetry, and Whirlpool stainless steel appliances—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The open living area features a custom entertainment center and a cozy gas fireplace, complemented by 9-foot ceilings and crown molding that create an inviting, spacious atmosphere.

Throughout the home, you’ll find upgraded flooring, plush carpeting, custom interior paint, and cultured marble bathroom countertops, reflecting pride of ownership and attention to detail. Upstairs, a versatile loft provides additional living or flex space, while the primary suite offers a private retreat complete with a soaking tub, generous closet space, and a custom built-in dresser.

Comfort and efficiency are enhanced with ceiling fans in every room and a programmable Wi-Fi thermostat. Step outside to a covered patio and beautifully landscaped backyard—ideal for relaxing, entertaining, or enjoying Southern California evenings. Additional highlights include a water softener, overhead garage storage, and smart organizational features throughout.

As a resident of Rosena Ranch, enjoy resort-style amenities including two pools, a spa, clubhouse, splash park, fitness center, and year-round community events.

Stylish, functional, and truly turnkey—this home is ready for immediate enjoyment and a smooth transition into your next chapter.

remarks:
Built in 2022 by Toll Brothers, this modern townhome is located within the gated 100 West community and offers a rare blend of newer construction, energy efficiency, and urban convenience in the heart of Anaheim.

The home features paid-off solar, helping reduce monthly utility costs, along with sleek, contemporary finishes throughout. The layout is thoughtfully designed with open living spaces, clean architectural lines, and modern materials that feel fresh, intentional, and move-in ready.
Residents enjoy gated access and well-maintained community amenities, creating a private and secure environment while remaining close to everything Anaheim has to offer. Just minutes from the Anaheim Packing House, shopping, dining, and entertainment, and a short drive to Disneyland, this location balances lifestyle and accessibility.

While the home does have freeway visibility, it benefits from excellent connectivity and stands out for its modern construction, efficient design, and overall quality, making it an exceptional opportunity within one of Anaheim’s newer communities.

remarks: Welcome to an unparalleled oasis of luxury and comfort just 5 minutes away from the bustling downtown Palm Springs Arts District. Situated on a sprawling lot over half an acre, this stunning compound property boasts of two homes, each offering unmatched opulence and style with all new renovations. The first house is a spacious 3 bedroom, 2 bath abode, while the second is a cozy 2 bedroom, 1 bath dwelling. This compound is perfect for the buyer that would love to utilize the main home as their primary residence and can rent out the guest home unlimited times out of the year to earn passive income to cover the mortgage with the Home-Share license issued by the city. This remarkable compound provides a perfect retreat for families, groups or anyone wanting to experience the good life in Palm Springs. Designed with a fine eye for detail, every inch of this majestic property is geared towards providing the ultimate in relaxation and entertainment. This home has an unbelievable yard which will be the envy of all and possibly the best in the city or anywhere for that matter.Step outside to discover an outdoor oasis that will leave you breathless. This property features not one, but two sparkling pools that beckon you to take a dip and cool off in the desert heat. Awe-inspiring landscaped grounds dotted with palm trees and lush vegetation are accentuated by stunning mountain views that set the perfect backdrop for your leisure time.

remarks: Step into a world of possibility in this spacious Suisun City home. This two-story home offers a functional and flexible layout, ready for your personal touch. The main level features a welcoming living area, a convenient half bath, a dedicated laundry room, and direct access to a two-car garage. The spacious backyard is perfect for entertaining, gardening, or creating your own outdoor retreat.Upstairs, you’ll find a versatile den, three bedrooms, and two full bathrooms—ready to be reimagined into your dream spaces. The potential is endless.   Located in a friendly, amenity-rich neighborhood, this home is just minutes from the Suisun City Marina, local shops, dining, and the Suisun–Fairfield Amtrak station. Solano Express, operated by SolTrans, offers direct bus service from Fairfield to the El Cerrito del Norte BART Station. Nearby parks, fishing spots, and Fairfield/Suisun wine tasting are all close at hand, with Napa Valley and Sacramento just a short drive away. Travis Air Force Base is also within easy reach.   Perfect for buyers ready to create their forever home or contractors looking for their next project, this property is a true blank canvas in a sought-after location. Bring your vision, roll up your sleeves, and turn it into a masterpiece.

remarks:
This single-family home offers 3,242 square feet of living space on a 10,018 square foot lot, situated at the end of a cul-de-sac in a residential neighborhood. The location provides relatively quiet surroundings with access to I-15 and I-215 freeways, nearby shopping centers, parks, and schools.

The home includes four bedrooms on the upper level. The primary bedroom features a two-part layout with a fireplace, a sitting area, and access to a private balcony.

The main level contains a formal living room, a separate dining area, a kitchen with a breakfast nook, and an adjacent great room with a second fireplace. Behind the great room, there is an additional large room that can serve as an office, library, or be converted into a bedroom. A full bathroom is located nearby.

Additional features include a three-car garage and a large side yard. The side yard has potential for RV access with the installation of a double gate.

This property combines a spacious interior layout with a sizable lot and flexible-use areas.
